channel.title: Android on UpTech
channel.description: Recent content in Android on UpTech

item.title: What Is Termux How to Install It And First Steps After Installation
item.description: Introduction To Termux TERMUX is a terminal emulator for Android system. It means that you can access to the system on your phone through a terminal like on Linux, Windows or macOS. Since Android is built on Linux, Termux use Unix-like commands. Unfortunately app is not available for iphone. Those who use Linux and macOS will be familiar with commands. For those who use Windows will be little unfamiliar since CMD ( Command Prompt ) use different commands.
